description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-sectioned layout with a combination of gable and hip roofs, giving it a classic suburban appearance. The exterior is primarily clad in light-colored siding with darker roofing, and there is a prominent covered porch running along the front, supported by columns. Large windows are distributed across the facade, with some grouped symmetrically and others placed more freely, providing ample natural light. The structure includes two visible stories, with the upper level set back in some sections, creating visual interest and depth. The house sits on a landscaped plot with green lawn areas and a paved driveway leading to a garage. Architectural details such as railings, steps, and a chimney add to the residential charm.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with gable and hip roofs, a covered front porch, and a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical window arrangements. The exterior features light siding, dark roofing, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, and garage, with columns and railings visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, upper story setbacks, and a portion of the landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and a secondary entry or patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chimney, steps, and more of the house's multi-level design.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door.
